hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git push' && curl -s -X POST "https://api.vercel.com/v1/integrations/deploy/prj_b1MOTexae1hacT7vGDYOAqeynVmb/GhBrD9k9ka" || true

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$file" != *"index.html"* ]] && exit 0; [ -f /tmp/collector-vbumped ] && exit 0; current=$(grep -oP '(?<=class="badge">v)[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' /home/user/collector/index.html 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$current" ] && exit 0; if [ -f /tmp/collector-major-bump ]; then major=$(echo "$current" | cut -d. -f1); new="$((major + 1)).0"; rm -f /tmp/collector-major-bump; label="major"; else new=$(python3 -c "v=float('$current'); print(f'{v+0.1:.1f}')"); label="minor"; fi; sed -i "s|class=\"badge\">v${current}|class=\"badge\">v${new}|" /home/user/collector/index.html; touch /tmp/collector-vbumped; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"🔖 버전 자동 업데이트: v${current} → v${new} (${label})\"}"
